records.ety: [Gr. <?/ a rubbing, fr. <?/ to rub, grind. So called because it causes protein to break up or to fall apart.]

defs: A proteolytic enzyme present in the pancreatic juice. Unlike the pepsin of the gastric juice, it acts in a neutral or alkaline fluid, and not only converts the albuminous matter of the food into soluble peptones, but also, in part, into leucin and tyrosin.
